minimenu.options.title: Minimenu Options
minimenu.options.link: This takes you to Minecraft's %s settings.
minimenu.options.title_screen.title: Title Screen
minimenu.options.title_screen.splash_tex: Set to ON to hide the splash texts.
minimenu.options.title_screen.panorama_s: Set to 0% to pause the panorama.
For legal reasons, we can only allow you to remove the "Do not distribute!" part of the text, not to remove the entirety of it.
minimenu.options.title_screen.version.de:
Syntax guide:
$vn - Client version (e.g. 26.1.2).
$id - Client identifier (Vanilla or Modded).
$pr - Information inside the parentheses.
minimenu.options.pause_screen.title: Pause Screen
modmenu.descriptionTranslation.minimenu: Declutters screens like the title screen through configurable options.
